mapper.insert: INSERT INTO diagnosis_report (user_id, session_id, report_id, total_score, level, score_change, previous_score, knowledge_analysis, thinking_analysis, mistake_patterns, learning_plan, detailed_comments) VALUES (#{userId}, #{sessionId}, #{reportId}, #{totalScore}, #{level}, #{scoreChange}, #{previousScore}, #{knowledgeAnalysis}, #{thinkingAnalysis}, #{mistakePatterns}, #{learningPlan}, #{detailedComments})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM diagnosis_report WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM diagnosis_report WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM diagnosis_report WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE diagnosis_report SET learning_plan = #{learningPlan} WHERE id = #{id}
